ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the trainer has been active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the trainer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the racing event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., dirt, turf) */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., flat, steeplechase) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "seconds" INTEGER /* Number of seconds */,
  "thirds" INTEGER /* Number of thirds */,
  "fourths" INTEGER /* Number of fourths */,
  "fifths" INTEGER /* Number of fifths */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings */,
  "per_start_earnings" REAL /* Earnings per start */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "top3_percentage" REAL /* Top 3 percentage */,
  "total_starts" INTEGER /* Total starts across all events */,
  "average_earnings_per_start" REAL /* Average earnings per start */,
  "best_finish" TEXT /* Best finish (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "worst_finish" TEXT /* Worst finish (e.g., 4th, 5th, 6th) */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_performance_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the trainer */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the trainer */,
  "total_starts" INTEGER /* Total starts in the event */,
  "average_earnings_per_start" REAL /* Average earnings per start */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-100) */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_rankings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., career, event-specific) */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic (e.g., official racing records, personal records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_stats_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Coat color of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Name of the sire (father) of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Name of the dam (mother) of the horse */,
  "pedigree_url" TEXT /* URL of the horse's pedigree */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "previous_owners" TEXT /* List of previous owners */,
  "current_owner" TEXT /* Current owner of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_horses" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "association_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association started */,
  "association_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended */,
  "association_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the association (e.g., training, racing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_horses_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_event_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was made */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., confirmed, withdrawn) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the event */,
  "handicap_weight" REAL /* Handicap weight assigned to the horse */,
  "post_position" INTEGER /* Post position of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_event_entries_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_event_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_event_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_event_entries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jockey */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the jockey */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the jockey */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the jockey has been active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the jockey's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, administrator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Registration date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
